text:
Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| BENE_ID | CCW Beneficiary ID | 
| REF_YEAR | Part D Plan Enrollment Year | 
| LIS_MONTHS | Part D Low Income Subsidy (LIS) Months | 
| AUTO_ASSIGNED_FLAG | Part D Plan Auto Assignment Indicator | 
| CHOOSER | Part D Plan Self Selection Indicator | 
| CRNT_PREV_YR_CHOOSER | Part D Plan Self Selection in Current or Previous Year Indicator | 
| REASSIGN_JAN | Beneficiary Newly Reassigned for January Plan |
